MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-07-459338 WITH CASE CGC-06-457301
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF LUXOR CAB COMPANY, INC'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-07-459338 WITH CASE CGC-06-457301 for all purposes is granted. No opposition filed. Lead case will be CGC-06-457301. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
